packs.name: FINTECH
packs.label: Fintech / Platform
packs.description: Primary repeatable discovery lane for payroll, accounting, reporting, controls, identity, reconciliation, and high-trust platform workflows.

packs.name: AI
packs.label: AI / Workflow
packs.description: Selective repeatable discovery lane for enterprise AI workflow, orchestration, operator tooling, evals, guardrails, and reliable structured-output systems.
queries: senior product manager internal tools ai

packs.name: GROWTH_BUSINESS_SYSTEMS
packs.label: Growth / Business Systems
packs.description: Repeatable volume lane for product-led growth, monetization, lifecycle, onboarding, pricing, experimentation, reporting, and workflow-conversion roles where Antonio can use systems and operational proof.

packs.name: ACCESS
packs.label: Access / Trust Workflow
packs.description: Exception pack for identity, permissions, access management, controls, compliance operations, and trust workflow roles when a specific posting or target-company reason exists.

packs.name: PAYMENTS_INSURANCE_CRYPTO_TRUST
packs.label: Payments / Insurance / Crypto Trust
packs.description: Exception pack for payments operations, insurance workflows, crypto trust, financial controls, ledgers, and reconciliation when a specific role or target-company reason exists.

packs.name: INDUSTRIAL_AUTONOMY_BRIDGE
packs.label: Industrial / Autonomy Bridge
packs.description: Exception pack for exploratory industrial, autonomy-adjacent, operator workflow, coordination, reliability, or control-software searches when explicitly requested.
queries: senior product manager operator workflow automation
